history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A dimly lit, eerie scene from a video game, likely Roblox, depicting two figures standing in a shallow, murky body of water surrounded by tall grass. The figures are stylized, cartoonish avatars wearing long, white robes, with one figure with long black hair embracing the other. They are facing away from the viewer, towards a dark, undefined background that suggests a foggy or nighttime environment. To the left, a cluster of white flowers on a bush adds a touch of somber beauty to the scene. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by dark greens, browns, and grays, with the white of the robes and flowers providing the main contrast. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, creating a mysterious and slightly unsettling mood, hinting at a narrative or a potentially scary encounter within the game. In the top left corner, there are game interface elements: a square icon, a three-line menu icon, an icon with a speech bubble and a number '3', and an icon representing multiple people. In the bottom right corner, a circular button with an upward-pointing arrow is visible, typical of mobile game controls.
